english_text: Congratulations on graduating
I finally graduated
Graduation ceremony is tomorrow
I am wearing a graduation gown
I feel emotional about graduating
I will miss my school days
I made lifelong friends here
Thank you to all my teachers
I could not have done it without you
The graduation speech was touching
I am the class representative
We threw our caps in the air
I received my diploma
I graduated with honors
I graduated at the top of my class
My parents came to the ceremony
I gave my parents flowers
We took lots of photos
I cried during the ceremony
Everyone was crying
I cannot believe it is over
Four years went by so fast
I am ready for the next chapter
What are your plans after graduation?
I am going to graduate school
I will start looking for a job
I want to take a gap year
I am going to travel after graduating
I feel both happy and sad
The yearbook has all our memories
Let us stay in touch
Do not be a stranger
I will never forget this school
korean_text: 이 학교를 절대 잊지 않을 거야
romanization: i hakgyoreul jeoldae itji aneul geoya

english_text: The last day of school was bittersweet
I cleaned out my locker
I returned my textbooks
The school looks different on graduation day
I received an award at graduation
My favorite teacher hugged me
We sang the school song one last time
I am so proud of our class
High school graduation is a big milestone
University graduation means becoming an adult
I feel nervous about the future
But I am also excited
We had an amazing class reunion already
I keep my graduation photo on my desk
Graduation is a beginning not an end
I am thankful for everything
Go out and conquer the world
The future is bright
Cheers to new beginnings
We did it together
Every ending is a new beginning
I am a graduate now
Class of 2026 forever
Thank you school for everything
Until we meet again
Here is to the future
I will make everyone proud
